Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Jul-18-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Timothy M. Workman, Farmer Case & Fedor, appearing for defendant Min Jin Shao via CourtCall; Telephone 619-338-0300;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF GERALD LEE, LOK YU Motion To Compel And For Monetary Sanctions is unopposed and granted. Defendant Min Jin Zhao is directed to (a) provide verified responses, without objections, to Plaintiffs' Special Interrogatories Sets One, Two and Three, and Requests for Production of Documents, Sets One and Two, and (b) pay discovery sanctions to Plaintiffs' counsel in the amount of $1,685, within 30 days of service of notice of entry of this order.

Prevailing party is to submit a form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312 by email to Judge Pro Tem Roger Mead at rmead@folgerlevin.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger Mead; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)
